TableStatus.description: The current state of the table

TableArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the table

TableSizeBytes.description: The total size of the specified table in bytes

ItemCount.description: The number of items in the specified table

CreationDateTime.description: The date and time when the table was created

KeySchema.description: The primary key structure for the table

LatestStreamLabel.description: A timestamp in ISO 8601 format of the stream label

LatestStreamArn.description: The ARN of the latest DynamoDB stream

DeletionProtectionEnabled.description: Indicates whether deletion protection is enabled
